creator: dcb314@hotmail.com
text:
[usr/src/sys/arm64/arm64/gic_v3.c:157]: (warning) Size of pointer 'gic_res' used instead of size of its data.

Source code is

   sc->gic_res = malloc(
        sizeof(sc->gic_res) * (sc->gic_redists.nregions + 1),
        M_GIC_V3, M_WAITOK);

Maybe better code

   sc->gic_res = malloc(
        sizeof(*(sc->gic_res)) * (sc->gic_redists.nregions + 1),
        M_GIC_V3, M_WAITOK);
